Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWNOTASSERVICO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName ddo_add.TitleControlIdToReplace = Btnadd.InternalName &addData = new() &addDataItem = new() &addDataItem.Title = 'Reenvia NFS-e' &addDataItem.EventKey = !'Reenvio' &addDataItem.IsDivider = False &addData.Add(&addDataItem) &addDataItem = new() &addDataItem.Title = 'Envio Agrupado E-mail' &addDataItem.Link = EnviarEmailAgrupado.Link() &addDataItem.IsDivider = False &addData.Add(&addDataItem) &NfsEntSai = nullvalue(&NfsEntSai) &NfsSts = nullvalue(&NfsSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Nota Serviço' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If &NfsDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() &NfsDtaEms_To = serverdate() &NfsDtaEms = &NfsDtaEms_To - 2 EndIF EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'wwNotasServicoColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'wwNotasServicoColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf NfsCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible NfsNum.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible NfsNumRps.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible NfsPedCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible NfsFilCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible NfsDtaEms.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible NfsCliCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible NfsCliRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible NfsProTer.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible NfsEntSai.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible NfsSts.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible NfsVlrTot.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(12).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount NfsProTer.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' NfsEntSai.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' NfsSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &UpdateUser = !'' &OqueFazer.Clear() &OqueFazer.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If (NfsSts = Status_Nfe.Digitando and NfsProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA) &OqueFazer.AddItem(1, 'Transmitir') Endif If (NfsProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA and NfsSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada) &OqueFazer.AddItem(2, 'Cancelar NFS-e') Endif If ((not NfsChv.IsEmpty() and not NfsChv.IsNull())) &OqueFazer.AddItem(3, 'Consultar NFS-e') Endif If ((not NfsDpsChv.IsEmpty() and not NfsDpsChv.IsNull()) and (NfsChv.IsEmpty() or NfsChv.IsNull())) &OqueFazer.AddItem(4, 'Consultar DPS') Endif If (NfsProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA) &OqueFazer.AddItem(5, 'Clonar NFS-e') Endif If (not NfsChv.IsEmpty()) &OqueFazer.AddItem(6, 'Exportar XML') Endif If (NfsProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA) &OqueFazer.AddItem(7, 'Solicitações') Endif If ((NfsProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS and &AutNiv > 2 ) or (NfsProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA and (&AutNiv > 3 or NfsNum.IsEmpty()))) &OqueFazer.AddItem(8, 'Excluir NFS-e') Endif If &OqueFazer.Count = 1 &OqueFazer.Class = !'Invisible' Else &OqueFazer.Class = !'Attribute' EndIf &EnviarEmail = !'' If ((NfsSts <> Status_NFe.Digitando and NfsSts <> Status_NFe.Inutilizada) and NfsProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA) &EnviarEmail.Class = !'Attribute' Else &EnviarEmail.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &ImprimirNFSe = !'' If (not NfsArqXml.IsEmpty() and not NfsArqXml.IsNull()) &ImprimirNFSe.Class = !'Attribute' Else &ImprimirNFSe.Class = !'Invisible' Endif Do Case Case NfsProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA NfsProTer.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case NfsProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS NfsProTer.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise NfsProTer.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase Do Case Case NfsEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada NfsEntSai.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case NfsEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida NfsEntSai.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Otherwise NfsEntSai.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase Do Case Case NfsSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada NfsSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case NfsSts = Status_NFe.Cancelada NfsSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case NfsSts = Status_NFe.Denegada NfsSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case NfsSts = Status_NFe.Inutilizada NfsSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise NfsSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'wwNotasServicoColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &OqueFazer.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &OqueFazer = 1 Do 'Do Reenviar' Case &OqueFazer = 2 Do 'Do CancelarNota' Case &OqueFazer = 3 Do 'Do ConsultarNFse' Case &OqueFazer = 4 Do 'Do ConsultarDPS' Case &OqueFazer = 5 Do 'Do ClonarNFe' Case &OqueFazer = 6 Do 'Do ExportarXML' Case &OqueFazer = 7 Do 'Do ConsultarStatus' Case &OqueFazer = 8 Do 'Do ExcluirNFe' EndCase &OqueFazer = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_ExcluirNFe.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_ExcluirNFe.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do Action ExcluirNFe' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInserirUser' &SessionGuidAux = GUID.NewGuid() &WebSessionKey = 'wpNFS_Data' + &SessionGuidAux.ToString().Trim() &WizardData = new() &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson()) wpNFs.Link('Capa', 'Capa', true, &SessionGuidAux) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoImportarXML' &SessionGuidAux = GUID.NewGuid() &WebSessionKey = 'wpImportarNFSe' + &SessionGuidAux.ToString().Trim() &WizardDataImportar = new() &WizardDataImportar.SelecioneXML.DeOndeVem = 'WWNOTASSERVICO' &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardDataImportar.ToJson()) wpImportarNFSe.Link('SelecioneXML', 'SelecioneXML', true, &SessionGuidAux) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_add.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_add.ActiveEventKey = !'Reenvio' Do 'Do Reenvio' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfsCod", '', !'Seq.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfsNum", '', !'Número', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfsNumRps", '', !'DPS', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfsPedCod", '', !'Pedido', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfsFilCod", '', !'Filial', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfsDtaEms", '', !'Emissão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfsCliCod", '', !'#', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfsCliRaz", '', !'Tomador', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfsProTer", '', !'Emissão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfsEntSai", '', !'Tipo', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfsSts", '', !'Status', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfsVlrTot", '', !'R$ Total', True, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'wwNotasServicoColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Reenviar' prcValidacoesNFSe.call(EmpCod, NfsCod, &IsErro, &erroMensagem) if &IsErro = false //sem erro prcNotaServicoTransmitida.Call(EmpCod, NfsCod) // GravaSolicitacao.Call(EmpCod, NfsFilCod, NfsCod, 0, TipoSolicitacao.Autorizar_NFSE, &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) // &SessionGuidAux = GUID.NewGuid() // // &WebSessionKey = 'wpNFS_Data' + &SessionGuidAux.ToString().Trim() // &WizardData = new() // &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod = EmpCod // &WizardData.Capa.NfsCod = NfsCod // &WizardData.Totais.SolCod = &SolCod // &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson()) // // wpnfs.Link('Capa', 'Transmitir', true, &SessionGuidAux) GeraXmlNFSe.Call(EmpCod, NfsFilCod, NfsCod, 'S', &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) &SessionGuidAux = GUID.NewGuid() &WebSessionKey = 'wpNFS_Data' + &SessionGuidAux.ToString().Trim() &WizardData = new() &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod = EmpCod &WizardData.Capa.NfsCod = NfsCod &WizardData.Totais.SolCod = &SolCod &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson()) wpnfs.Link('Capa', 'Transmitir', true, &SessionGuidAux) Else msg(&ErroMensagem) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CancelarNota' wpcancelaNotaFiscalServico.Link('WWNOTASSERVICO', EmpCod, NfsCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ConsultarNFse' GravaConsultaSEFAZ_NFSE.Call('WWNOTASSERVICO', EmpCod, NfsFilCod, NfsCod, &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) wpConsultaNFSe.Link(EmpCod, NfsCod, &SolCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ConsultarDPS' GravaConsultaSEFAZ_NFSE.Call('WWNOTASSERVICO', EmpCod, NfsFilCod, NfsCod, &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) wpConsultaNFSe.Link(EmpCod, NfsCod, &SolCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ClonarNFe' wpClonarNFSe.Popup(EmpCod, NfsCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExportarXML' &NfsArqXml = RetornaXmlNotaNFse.udp(EmpCod, NfsCod) // if &NfsArqXml.IsEmpty() // GeraXmlNfsModelo65_4.Call(EmpCod, NfsFilCod, NfsCod, 'N', &Context.PesCod, 'E', &SolCod) // EndIF if &NfsArqXml.IsEmpty() msg('Xml não Localizado') Else retornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(EmpCod, NfsFilCod, &sdtConfiguracoesPasta) &Nome_arquivo = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis.Trim() +NfsChv+ '.xml' &XmlWriter.Open(&Nome_arquivo) &XmlWriter.WriteRawText(&NfsArqXml) &XmlWriter.Close() &Nome_arquivo = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempVir.Trim() +NfsChv+'.xml' Link(&Nome_arquivo) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ConsultarStatus' wpsolicitacoesNF.Popup('NFSE', EmpCod, NfsFilCod, NfsCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExcluirNFe' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod_Selected = EmpCod &NfsCod_Selected = NfsCod DVelop_ConfirmPanel_ExcluirNFe.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Action ExcluirNFe' prcDeletarNFSe.Call(&EmpCod_Selected, &NfsCod_Selected) refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Reenvio' wpRetransmitirNotasServico.Popup() Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFSNUM" &NfsNum.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFSFILCOD" &NfsFilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFSCLIRAZ" &NfsCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFSENTSAI" &NfsEntSai.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFSDTAEMS" &NfsDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &NfsDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFSSTS" &NfsSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFSNUM", "", not &NfsNum.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfsNum.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFSFILCOD", "", not &NfsFilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfsFilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFSCLIRAZ", "", not &NfsCliRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfsCliRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFSENTSAI", "", not &NfsEntSai.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfsEntSai, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFSDTAEMS", "", not (&NfsDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &NfsDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &NfsDtaEms.ToString().Trim(), &NfsDtaEms_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFSSTS", "", not &NfsSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfsSts, '') &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"NotaServico" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &UpdateUser.Click &SessionGuidAux = GUID.NewGuid() &WebSessionKey = 'wpNFS_Data' + &SessionGuidAux.ToString().Trim() &WizardData = new() &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod = EmpCod &WizardData.Capa.NfsCod = NfsCod &WizardData.Capa.NfsTipNF = NfsTipNF &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson()) wpnfs.Link('Capa', 'Capa', true, &SessionGuidAux) EndEvent Event &ImprimirNFSe.Click GeraPdfDanfeNFSe.Call(EmpCod, NfsCod, &UrlPDF, &UrlFisico) RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = Link(&UrlPDF) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndEvent Event &EnviarEmail.Click wpEnviaNFS.Popup(EmpCod, NfsCod) EndEvent

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
